description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and essentials in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish handbag from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this bag anywhere and add style to any casual outfit. Product Details Purple handbag One short strap Foldable flap with a concealed metallic button closure One main compartment with a zipped separator an internal zippered pocket One zippered pocket at the back Material and Care Corduroy Wipe surface with a damp cloth when necessary Size Height: 24 cm Width: 34 cm Depth: 8 cm
